        • undoManager

          boolean isEditable

          boolean skipFigureModelUnlink

          boolean isSelectionEnabled

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration.BitmapFigure extends BlockDecorationFigure implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      3357210009571869767L

      • Serialized Fields

        • bitmap

          Image bitmap
          This is a reference to a bitmap.

        • framed

          boolean framed
          true if this bitmap area must be framed, false otherwise.

        • filename

          URL filename
          This is the filename of the icon.

        • filled

          boolean filled
          true if this text area must be filled, false otherwise.

          boolean framed
          true if this text area must be framed, false otherwise.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration.PolylineFigure extends DecorationFigure implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      3504513094459260798L

      • Serialized Fields

        • filled

          boolean filled
          true if this area must be filled, false otherwise.

        • framed

          boolean framed
          true if this area must be framed, false otherwise.

        • closed

          boolean closed
          true if this area must be closed to form a polygon, false otherwise.

        • drawingMethod

          DrawingMethod drawingMethod

        • points

          List<E> points
          This is the set of control points that composed this edge.

        • bufferedPath

          SoftReference<T> bufferedPath
          Buffered general path.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.decoration.RectangleFigure extends BlockDecorationFigure implements Serializable

          true if this text area must be filled, false otherwise.

  • Package org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.EdgeFigure extends AbstractModelObjectFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>> implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -1067666543925554497L

      • Serialized Fields

        • points

          List<E> points
          This is the set of control points that composed this edge.

        • startSymbol

          EdgeSymbol startSymbol
          This is the end-symbol connected to the source port.

        • endSymbol

          EdgeSymbol endSymbol
          This is the end-symbol connected to the target port.

        • bufferedPath

          SoftReference<T> bufferedPath
          Buffered general path.

  • Package org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol extends EdgeSymbol implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -2126493322237125528L

      • Serialized Fields

        • isFilled

          boolean isFilled
          Indicates if the symbol is filled with the filling color replied by EdgeSymbol.getFillingColor() or not. If true the color replied by EdgeSymbol.getFillingColor() is used. If false the color replied by EdgeSymbol.getLineColor() is used.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.ArrowEdgeSymbol extends EdgeSymbol implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      8312461474430015270L

      • Serialized Fields

        • length

          float length
          This is the size of arrow's branches.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.CircleEdgeSymbol extends AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -6205572453480237197L

      • Serialized Fields

          This is the radius of the circle.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.DiamondEdgeSymbol extends AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -5581243771422101401L

      • Serialized Fields

        • length

          float length
          This is the size of diamond branches.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.EdgeSymbol extends AbstractPropertyTooler implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      3798013358094775638L

      • Serialized Fields

        • edge

          WeakReference<T> edge
          The instance of the EdgeFigure that contains this symbol.

        • angle

          float angle
          The angle with which the sumbol was painted.

        • x

          float x
          The position of the end of the edge.

        • y

          float y
          The position of the end of the edge.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.RectangleEdgeSymbol extends AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      3234441947851676253L

      • Serialized Fields

        • width

          float width
          This is the size of the rectangle perpendicularly to the edge vector.

        • height

          float height
          This is the size of the rectangle along the edge vector.

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol.SlotInEdgeSymbol extends AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      4087089993629404684L

      • Serialized Fields

        • width

          float width
          This is the size of the rectangle perpendicularly to the edge vector.

          This is the size of the rectangle along the edge vector.

          This is the size of triangle branches.

  • Package org.arakhne.neteditor.io

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.io.VectorialExporterException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -2039720200617582141L

  • Package org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.GMLException extends IOException implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      8847814979785904893L

  • Package org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.parser

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.parser.ParseException extends Exception implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • currentToken

          Token currentToken
          This is the last token that has been consumed successfully. If this object has been created due to a parse error, the token followng this token will (therefore) be the first error token.

        • expectedTokenSequences

          int[][] expectedTokenSequences
          Each entry in this array is an array of integers. Each array of integers represents a sequence of tokens (by their ordinal values) that is expected at this point of the parse.

        • tokenImage

          String[] tokenImage
          This is a reference to the "tokenImage" array of the generated parser within which the parse error occurred. This array is defined in the generated ...Constants interface.

        • eol

          String eol
          The end of line string for this machine.

  • Package org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.readers

    • Class org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.readers.AbstractGMLReader.Namespace extends TreeMap<String,Object> implements Serializable

      7721656428144981665L

          String name

        • isAlwaysRemovingModelObjects

          boolean isAlwaysRemovingModelObjects

        • skipFigureModelUnlink

          boolean skipFigureModelUnlink

        • deletionLock

          ReentrantLock deletionLock
          Lock resource that may be used for deletion actions.

        • eventHandler

          org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.JFigureView.EventHandler eventHandler
          Handler for events.
